# MuleSoft Workday Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (16.7) of Workday Connector documentation.
> See [Workday Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Workday Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Workday Connector 16.7](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Workday Connector 16.7 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/workday-connector-examples.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Workday Connector 16.7](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/workday-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Workday Connector 16.7](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/workday-connector-troubleshoot.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Workday Connector to 16.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/workday-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Workday Connector 16.7 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/workday-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Workday Connector 16.7 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/workday-connector/latest/workday-reference.md)
